news_data.title: Tesla Delivers Record 1.8M Vehicles in 2023
news_data.snippet: Tesla achieved record annual deliveries but fell short of its 2M target amid growing EV competition.

news_data.title: Tesla Cuts Prices Again as Margin Pressure Mounts
news_data.snippet: Gross automotive margins fell to 17.6% as Tesla slashed prices across all models to defend market share.

news_data.title: BYD Overtakes Tesla as World's Top EV Seller
news_data.snippet: Chinese rival BYD sold more battery-electric vehicles than Tesla in Q4, intensifying the global EV race.

news_data.title: Musk's Political Activity Raises Brand Risk Concerns
news_data.snippet: Analysts warn that CEO's polarizing public statements could alienate portions of Tesla's customer base.

news_data.title: Tesla FSD V12 Shows Promise But Regulatory Hurdles Remain
news_data.snippet: End-to-end neural network approach impresses testers, but full autonomy timeline remains uncertain.

social_data.title: TSLA Is Either $500 or $50
social_data.snippet: No in-between with this stock. If FSD works it's the most valuable company on earth. If not, it's a car company trading at 60x.

social_data.title: Cancelled My Tesla Order
social_data.snippet: Was a loyal customer with 2 Teslas. CEO behavior made me switch to Rivian. Many friends doing the same.

social_data.title: Tesla Cybertruck Delivery Day
social_data.snippet: Just took delivery. Build quality is way better than early reviews suggested. This thing is a beast.

review_data.title: Tesla Employee Review — Production Associate
review_data.snippet: Intense pace, long hours, but you feel like you're building the future. Compensation is stock-heavy.

review_data.title: Tesla Employee Review — Software Engineer
review_data.snippet: Move fast culture. Great if you thrive under pressure, burnout risk is real. Flat hierarchy is a plus.
